productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Citius 2+ MSL White Sports Shoes
description: The nike Field Trainer Textile is inspired by the pitch. Taking a cue from training, the nike Field Trainer Textile men's shoe is a lightweight design with a flexible Fit. Featuring classic lines and a breathable upper, this shoe is a sporty must-have. Different textures and tones of suede, leather and shiny textile in grey gives a great look to the shoe, perfectly complemented by the blue Nike swoosh. This sporty choice will look great with casual outfits when you feel like upping the style stakes. Upper Suede leather and textile upper for protection and durability Perforations on the midfoot for breathability Lace-ups for a snug, customised fit Cushioned mesh collar and tongue for greater comfort Appliquéd Nike swoosh on the sides Brand tab attached to tongue and printed on back heel Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Midsole PU cupsole at the midsole for a lightweight feel Outsole Durable rubber outsole with pivot point, grooves and lugs for greater grip and easy 180 degree movement of the foot Shoe care Remove dust and dirt with damp clean cloth Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
